seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nene Valley and Nepean Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nene Valley vs Nepean Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nene Valley and Nepean Bay.
heading: Nene Valley vs Nepean Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nene Valley, South Australia and Nepean Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nene Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Nepean Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nene Valley or Nepean Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nene Valley has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Nepean Bay scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nene Valley scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Nepean Bay scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nene Valley or Nepean Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nene Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
